phrases.intent_en: Where is the Danube promenade walkway
phrases.cultural_note: The Danube promenade (Donausteig) is a scenic riverside walkway popular for evening strolls and river views in Krems.

likely_response.local: Folgen Sie der Hauptstraße zum Fluss.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the main street to the river.

responses.english: Follow the main street to the river.
responses.local: Folgen Sie der Hauptstraße zum Fluss.

phrases.intent_en: Do cellar bars accept cards only cash
phrases.text_local: Wird in den Weinkellern Karte akzeptiert?
phrases.cultural_note: Cellar bars (Keller) are small, intimate wine spaces below street level, often family-owned. Payment in cash is standard practice.

phrases.text_local: Wo finde ich den nächsten Heurigen?
phrases.cultural_note: Heurigen are traditional wine taverns offering self-serve wine and snacks, often family-run. Visitors are expected to tally their own consumption on provided sheets.

likely_response.local: Gehen Sie die Gasse hinunter nach links.
likely_response.translation_en: Go down the alley to the left.

responses.english: Go down the alley to the left.
responses.local: Gehen Sie die Gasse hinunter nach links.

phrases.intent_en: How do I enter private tastings
phrases.text_local: Wie komme ich zu privaten Verkostungen?
phrases.cultural_note: Private tastings are invitation-only or by appointment with local winemakers. The Winzer (wine grower) decides access and often hosts directly.

likely_response.translation_en: On request with the wine grower.

responses.english: On request with the wine grower.
